where.if: AND (mb.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mb.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT pl.id AS id, pl.member_id AS member_id, mb.name AS member_name, mb.email AS member_email, mb.church_id AS church_id, pl.delta AS delta, pl.balance_after AS balance_after, pl.reason AS reason, pl.source_type AS source_type, pl.status AS status, pl.expire_at AS expire_at, pl.created_at AS created_at FROM POINT_LEDGER pl JOIN MEMBER mb ON pl.member_id = mb.id
ORDER BY ${orderBy} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POINT_LEDGER pl JOIN MEMBER mb ON pl.member_id = mb.id

SELECT pl.id AS id, pl.member_id AS member_id, mb.name AS member_name, mb.email AS member_email, mb.church_id AS church_id, pl.delta AS delta, pl.balance_after AS balance_after, pl.reason AS reason, pl.source_type AS source_type, pl.status AS status, pl.expire_at AS expire_at, pl.created_at AS created_at FROM POINT_LEDGER pl JOIN MEMBER mb ON pl.member_id = mb.id WHERE pl.id = #{id}
